title: dryadella dodsonii
intro: Dryadella dodsonii, also known as the Dodson's Dryadella, is a species of epiphytic orchid native to Ecuador. As a medicinal plant, Dryadella dodsonii has been found to have antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to its flavonoid and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its anti-aging and antioxidant properties. Dryadella dodsonii is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal use.
